meta.title: Experiences — Villa Mandara
meta.description: Bespoke experiences at Villa Mandara — gastronomy, wellness rituals, nature and moments to remember.

gastronomy.title: Gastronomy
gastronomy.intro: Dining becomes a journey — from refined seasonal dinners to slow breakfasts on the pergola and tastings of local wines.

wellness.title: Wellness & rituals
wellness.intro: A private space to restore — herbal spa rituals, yoga in silence and slow afternoons by the pool, guided by an attentive team.

nature.title: Nature & adventure
nature.intro: The mountain begins at your doorstep — Belasitsa trails, herb walks and quiet detours to the monastery, shaped around your pace.

events.title: Events & celebrations
events.intro: Moments that last. From intimate gatherings to milestone celebrations — orchestrated elegantly and with discreet care.
